<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>WellScale – Scale Your Aesthetic Clinic</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --blue-900:   #0A1628;
  --blue-800:   #0F2347;
  --blue-700:   #163472;
  --blue-600:   #1A4496;
  --blue-500:   #2157BE;
  --blue-400:   #3B74D4;
  --blue-300:   #6B9FE8;
  --blue-200:   #A8C8F5;
  --blue-100:   #DAEAFD;
  --blue-50:    #EEF5FE;
  --white:      #FFFFFF;
  --off-white:  #F8FAFF;
  --text:       #0A1628;
  --muted:      #4A6080;
  --muted-lt:   #8FAAC8;
  --border:     #D6E4F7;
  --border-md:  #B8D0EF;
  --success:    #2E7D32;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  background: var(--white);
  color: var(--text);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 6%;
  height: 68px;
  background: var(--white);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 99;
}
.logo {
  font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  color: var(--blue-800);
}
.logo span { color: var(--blue-500); }
.nav-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; }
.nav-link {
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.nav-link:hover { color: var(--blue-500); }
.nav-cta {
  font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--white);
  background: var(--blue-600);
  padding: 9px 22px; border-radius: 4px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
}
.nav-cta:hover { background: var(--blue-700); transform: translateY(-1px); }

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero {
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--blue-900) 0%, var(--blue-700) 55%, var(--blue-500) 100%);
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  padding: 104px 6% 100px;
  text-align: center;
}
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse 65% 55% at 50% -10%, rgba(107,159,232,0.22) 0%, transparent 65%);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.hero::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(107,159,232,0.5), transparent);
}
.hero-inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 840px; margin: 0 auto; }

.pre-headline-wrap {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 30px;
}
.pre-line { height: 1px; width: 36px; background: var(--blue-300); opacity: 0.6; }
.pre-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.17em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--blue-300);
}

.hero-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: rgba(107,159,232,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(107,159,232,0.3);
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
  font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 36px; line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 660px;
}
.hero-tag strong { color: var(--blue-200); font-weight: 500; }

h1 {
  font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.1rem, 4.8vw, 3.5rem);
  font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.18;
  color: var(--white);
  margin-bottom: 24px; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}
h1 em { font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--blue-200); }

.sub-headline {
  font-size: 1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.52);
  font-weight: 300; max-width: 520px;
  margin: 0 auto 38px; line-height: 1.8;
}
.sub-headline strong { color: var(--blue-200); font-weight: 500; }

.cta-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.btn-primary {
  display: inline-block;
  background: var(--white);
  color: var(--blue-700);
  padding: 16px 44px; border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; border: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.btn-primary:hover {
  background: var(--blue-50); transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(10,22,40,0.25);
}
.btn-sub { font-size: 0.72rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); letter-spacing: 0.06em; }

/* ── TRUST BAR ── */
.trust-bar {
  background: var(--blue-50);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 15px 6%;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  gap: 36px; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.trust-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  font-size: 0.73rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.09em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--blue-700);
}
.trust-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: var(--blue-400); border-radius: 50%; }
.trust-sep { width: 1px; height: 18px; background: var(--border-md); }

/* ── SECTION BASE ── */
.section { max-width: 1020px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 6%; }
.section-eyebrow { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.eyebrow-line { width: 26px; height: 2px; background: var(--blue-400); flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 2px; }
.eyebrow-text { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.17em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue-500); }
.section-title {
  font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.65rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.22;
  color: var(--blue-900); margin-bottom: 12px; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}
.section-title em { font-weight: 400; font-style: italic; color: var(--blue-500); }
.section-sub {
  font-size: 0.93rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 300;
  max-width: 500px; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 44px;
}

/* ── METRICS BAND ── */
.metrics-band {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-800) 0%, var(--blue-600) 60%, var(--blue-400) 100%);
  padding: 72px 6%;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.metrics-band::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: -60px; right: -60px;
  width: 280px; height: 280px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(107,159,232,0.1);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.metrics-inner { max-width: 1020px; margin: 0 auto; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
.metrics-band .eyebrow-line { background: var(--blue-200); }
.metrics-band .eyebrow-text { color: var(--blue-200); }
.metrics-band .section-title { color: var(--white); max-width: 440px; margin-bottom: 48px; }
.metrics-row {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
  border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}
.metric {
  padding: 36px 20px;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  text-align: center;
}
.metric:last-child { border-right: none; }
.metric-num {
  font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;
  font-size: 2.7rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.metric-label { font-size: 0.76rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.5; }

/* ── OFFERINGS ── */
.offerings-section { background: var(--off-white); padding: 80px 0; }
.offerings-inner { max-width: 1020px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 6%; }
.offerings-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(285px, 1fr));
  gap: 1px;
  background: var(--border);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
}
.offering-card {
  background: var(--white);
  padding: 28px 26px;
  transition: background 0.22s;
  position: relative;
}
.offering-card:hover { background: var(--blue-50); }
.offering-card::before {
  content: '';
  display: block; width: 28px; height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--blue-500), var(--blue-300));
  border-radius: 2px; margin-bottom: 16px;
  transition: width 0.3s ease;
}
.offering-card:hover::before { width: 48px; }
.offering-card h4 { font-size: 0.93rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--blue-900); margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.35; }
.offering-card p { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.65; }

/* ── GUARANTEE ── */
.guarantee-outer {
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, var(--blue-900) 0%, var(--blue-800) 40%, var(--blue-600) 100%);
  padding: 80px 6%;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.guarantee-outer::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; bottom: -80px; left: -80px;
  width: 360px; height: 360px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(59,116,212,0.12); pointer-events: none;
}
.guarantee-outer::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: -40px; right: 10%;
  width: 200px; height: 200px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(107,159,232,0.07); pointer-events: none;
}
.guarantee-inner { max-width: 1020px; margin: 0 auto; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
.guarantee-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr;
  gap: 72px; align-items: center;
}
.guarantee-left { text-align: center; }
.g-days {
  font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;
  font-size: 7.5rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}
.g-label { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue-200); margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0.7; }
.guarantee-right .eyebrow-line { background: var(--blue-300); }
.guarantee-right .eyebrow-text { color: var(--blue-200); }
.guarantee-right h3 {
  font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.6vw, 2.15rem); font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white); line-height: 1.25;
  margin: 16px 0 18px; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}
.guarantee-right h3 em { font-weight: 400; font-style: italic; color: var(--blue-200); }
.guarantee-right p {
  font-size: 0.9rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); font-weight: 300;
  line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 30px; max-width: 440px;
}
.btn-outline {
  display: inline-block;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
  padding: 15px 40px; border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); transform: translateY(-1px); }

/* ── CONTACT FORM ── */
.form-section {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--blue-50) 0%, var(--white) 100%);
  padding: 80px 6%;
}
.form-container { max-width: 1020px; margin: 0 auto; }
.form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.15fr; gap: 64px; align-items: start; }
.form-left .section-sub { margin-bottom: 32px; }
.form-promise {
  border-left: 3px solid var(--blue-400);
  padding-left: 18px; margin-top: 32px;
}
.form-promise p { font-size: 0.84rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.75; }
.form-promise strong { color: var(--blue-800); font-weight: 600; }
.form-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 40px 36px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(26,68,150,0.08);
}
.form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 14px; }
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 7px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.form-group.full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
label { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue-800); }
input, select, textarea {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text);
  background: var(--off-white);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px; padding: 11px 15px;
  width: 100%; outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  appearance: none;
}
input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { color: var(--muted-lt); }
input:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--blue-400);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,116,212,0.12);
}
textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 96px; }

.btn-submit {
  width: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-700) 0%, var(--blue-500) 100%);
  color: var(--white); padding: 15px; border: none;
  border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.09em;
  text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer;
  transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.15s; margin-top: 4px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;
}
.btn-submit:hover { opacity: 0.88; transform: translateY(-1px); }
.btn-submit:disabled { 
  opacity: 0.6; 
  cursor: not-allowed; 
  /* Changed to Light Blue to match theme */
  background: var(--blue-300); 
  pointer-events: none;
}
.form-note { text-align: center; font-size: 0.71rem; color: var(--muted-lt); margin-top: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

/* Status Message Styles */
#status-msg {
  margin-top: 15px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  text-align: center;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 10px;
  display: none;
}
.status-success {
  background-color: rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.1);
  color: var(--success);
  border: 1px solid rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.2);
}
.status-error {
  background-color: rgba(211, 47, 47, 0.1);
  color: #d32f2f;
  border: 1px solid rgba(211, 47, 47, 0.2);
}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer {
  background: var(--blue-900);
  text-align: center; padding: 26px 6%;
  font-size: 0.74rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.22);
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}
footer span { color: var(--blue-300); opacity: 0.8; }

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(26px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
.hero-inner > * { animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both; }
.hero-inner .pre-headline-wrap { animation-delay: 0.06s; }
.hero-inner .hero-tag          { animation-delay: 0.18s; }
.hero-inner h1                 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.hero-inner .sub-headline      { animation-delay: 0.42s; }
.hero-inner .cta-group         { animation-delay: 0.54s; }

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .metrics-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .metric { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); }
  .metric:nth-child(odd) { border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); }
  .metric:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .guarantee-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 36px; }
  .g-days { font-size: 5rem; }
  .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
  .form-card { padding: 28px 20px; }
  .nav-link { display: none; }
  .trust-sep { display: none; }
  .trust-bar { gap: 16px; }
}
@media (max-width: 520px) {
  .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .metrics-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .metric { border-right: none; }
  .metric { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); }
  .metric:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
}

<!-- JAVASCRIPT FOR VALIDATION, GOOGLE SHEETS & REDIRECT -->
<script>
  // --- 1. VALIDATION LOGIC ---
  
  function validateForm() {
    const name = document.getElementById('name').value.trim();
    const phone = document.getElementById('phone').value.trim();
    const clinic = document.getElementById('clinic').value.trim();
    const city = document.getElementById('city').value.trim();
    const service = document.getElementById('service').value;
    const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');

    // Check if all required fields are filled
    const isNameValid = name.length > 0;
    const isClinicValid = clinic.length > 0;
    const isCityValid = city.length > 0;
    const isServiceValid = service !== "";
    
    // Specific check for phone: Must be exactly 10 digits
    const isPhoneValid = phone.length === 10 && !isNaN(phone);

    // Enable button only if everything is valid
    if (isNameValid && isPhoneValid && isClinicValid && isCityValid && isServiceValid) {
      submitBtn.disabled = false;
    } else {
      submitBtn.disabled = true;
    }
  }

  // Initialize form as disabled
  window.onload = function() {
    validateForm();
  }


  // --- 2. GOOGLE SHEETS SUBMISSION & REDIRECT ---

  const scriptURL = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxdsEnUBEWSsHj4pwhlYr72FAhYAgPVS6ho6hZsWzAuPPLkVdJC6rv1ri5TkXHwL5iz/exec'; 

  const form = document.forms['submit-to-google-sheet'];
  const statusMsg = document.getElementById('status-msg');
  const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
  const btnText = document.querySelector('.btn-text');
  const btnLoader = document.querySelector('.btn-loader');

  form.addEventListener('submit', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    // Double check validation just in case
    if(submitBtn.disabled) return;
    
    // UI Loading State
    submitBtn.disabled = true;
    btnText.style.display = 'none';
    btnLoader.style.display = 'inline';
    statusMsg.style.display = 'none';

    // Send Data to Google Sheets
    fetch(scriptURL, { method: 'POST', body: new FormData(form)})
      .then(response => {
        // Success State
        statusMsg.innerText = "Success! Redirecting to Thank You page...";
        statusMsg.className = "status-success";
        statusMsg.style.display = 'block';
        
        // Reset Form
        form.reset();
        
        // Re-validate form (disables button again)
        validateForm();
        
        // Reset Button Text/Loader visual
        btnText.style.display = 'inline';
        btnLoader.style.display = 'none';

        // --- ADDED REDIRECT LOGIC ---
        // 1.5 seconds ke baad user ko thank you page par bhej dega
        setTimeout(() => {
            window.location.href = "https://wellscalemedia.com/thank-you/";
        }, 1500);
      })
      .catch(error => {
        // Error State
        console.error('Error!', error.message);
        statusMsg.innerText = "Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.";
        statusMsg.className = "status-error";
        statusMsg.style.display = 'block';

        // Reset Button
        submitBtn.disabled = false; // Allow retry
        btnText.style.display = 'inline';
        btnLoader.style.display = 'none';
      });
  });
</script>
